# v1.1.2 release notes

The dashboard install button is gone. If you want to keep the OS on removable media, use the terminal installer instead.

## What's new

- Removed the dashboard footer button for installing to an external drive.
- The external-drive install flow still exists from the terminal as `sudo ai-os-install-to-disk`.
- README, Getting Started, and changelogs now match the updated UI.

## For users updating from v1.1.x

The updater should see this as the newest tagged release after the build publishes. Use Update OS as usual once the ISO is published.

## Verify download

```sh
sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS
```

You want to see `OK` next to the ISO name.
